necessityProof.blockerResolved: Deployment and identity boundary reports still duplicated the same Markdown title/meta/section frame after foundational governance reports were migrated.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: N1 final acceptance can now classify deployment readiness, deployment safety, IdP verifier boundary, and idempotency vertical readiness review reports as builder-backed before scanning controlled shard preview renderers.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The shared builder owns standard entries/messages/list sections. Deployment environment prefixed evidence rows, IdP verifier-state h3 rows, and idempotency artifact h3 rows remain local lines sections to preserve byte-identical output.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: No new helper was added. Add a shared nested-section formatter only after several remaining renderers prove the same h3 grammar repeats beyond local wrappers.

byteIdenticalCompare.method: Temporary Vitest loaded each legacy renderer through git show HEAD:<path>, transpiled it in-memory with TypeScript, and compared deployment missing/ready, safety safe/actions-on, IdP complete/missing, and idempotency ready/blocked variants.

archiveDeliverables.codeWalkthrough: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2110-renderer-consolidation-batch-22-v2139.md

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2139 changes only Node Markdown renderer internals and archive documentation. It does not change evidence schemas, routes, fresh sibling evidence requirements, or live integration startup behavior.
